entities.name: Pine Script Strategy
entities.description: A platform offering education and tools for traders to build custom strategies using Pine Script.

entities.name: Courses
entities.description: Educational offerings that teach traders how to use Pine Script and develop trading strategies.

entities.name: Pine Script Pro Traders Hub
entities.description: A community and resource hub for traders to enhance their skills in Pine Script.

entities.name: Trader Profile
entities.description: A feature that helps traders assess their trading psychology and risk tolerance.

entities.name: Trader Psychology Profile Assessment Quiz
entities.description: A quiz designed to help traders understand their psychological profile.

entities.name: Trader Risk Tolerance Assessment Quiz
entities.description: A quiz that assesses a trader's risk tolerance.

entities.name: Blog
entities.description: A section providing articles and insights related to trading and Pine Script.

entities.name: Support
entities.description: Customer support services for users of the Pine Script Strategy platform.

entities.name: Reviews
entities.description: Testimonials and success stories from students who have taken the courses.

entities.name: Strategy Optimizer
entities.description: A tool that helps traders optimize their trading strategies.

entities.name: Essential Coder
entities.description: A course tier that provides access to essential coding resources and community support.

entities.name: Pro Trader
entities.description: A course tier that includes advanced resources, live Q&A sessions, and market analysis.

entities.name: Master Developer
entities.description: The highest course tier offering extensive resources, private coaching, and VIP support.
